caption: A presentation slide titled "DARPA OPS-5G Program Overview" is displayed across all frames. The slide outlines the "OPS-5G Vision:" to "Augment Open Source Software to obtain a secure 5G system." A diagram illustrates a transition process, starting with a block stating "Today: 5G stack is an opaque, integrated SW/HW system." An arrow labeled "Open Source decouples HW, SW" leads to two parallel paths: "Open source software (SW)" and "Non-US hardware (HW) systems." These lead to goals of "Secure open source SW Fast SW development" and a transition toward "Non-US HW," "US HW," and "Open Source HW." Logos for THE LINUX FOUNDATION, LF NETWORKING, and LF EDGE appear at the bottom, alongside the hashtag "#openenedge" and a distribution statement. In the top right corner, a small inset video shows a man with short dark hair wearing a blue shirt. The scene remains static across the frames, with no changes to the text or the man's appearance.
